name: Amsterdam
author: ryandicicco
description:
```markdown
Real CBS (Statistics Netherlands) neighborhood data for population and jobs. Commute routes pre-calculated. Coverage includes Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Noord, Zuidoost/Bijlmer, Zuidas, Westpoort, Zaandam, Purmerend, Diemen, Amstelveen, Haarlemmermeer, and Schiphol (EHAM) with all piers.
```
